label: Quarantine Strongroom
description: The Quarantine Strongroom forms the secured storage chamber of The Gloam Reliquary, built of poured ferrocrete faced with void-black adamantine plates. Shelving bays and sealed transit crates stand in regimented rows beneath cold lumen strips, each position stenciled with lot codes and dated purity seals. A decontamination threshold and drain-scored flooring impose containment discipline, keeping the air sharp with antiseptic and recirculated filtration. Auspex housings, tamper-evident locks, and numbered restraint hoops define the room’s function as controlled custody rather than mere storage.
